item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: High school students are reminded that they must arrange to be picked up after their exam, otherwise, regular school bus transportation is available at end of day dismissal.

item.title: A message from Mr. Curtis:
item.description: A Big congrats to the STA Senior Band on their stellar performance at St. Mother Teresa and St. Mary's on Friday. From Loading and unloading the Uhaul, to playing Pirates to Crazy Train, you represented STA with pride and should be proud of what you accomplished together. Thank you for all your hard work, and Bravo!

item.title: A message from Guidance:
item.description: Could the following students come see Mr. Spence after announcements: Donovan Belisle, Naveah Bos, Colin Epps, Ava Graham, Keegan O'Neil, Logan Orr, Aemon Rahmer, Phoenyx Siba, Rebecca Simmons, Hope Theos, Ava Whitten
